request_summary: Review the cleared bounded baseline and execute the governed research superpower expansion.
decision_to_be_made: How should ProductOS broaden web and feed research coverage while keeping PM review, freshness, and contradiction handling explicit?

mission_router.routing_rationale: Run the full PM loop from a mission-first discover start while keeping PM approval explicit at every decision-driving boundary.
stop_conditions: Stop if any phase loses provenance, reviewability, or PM approval visibility.
Stop if downstream phases outrun the accepted mission package.
Stop if release-facing claims exceed the current evidence-backed boundary.

operating_norms: Treat the repository as the system of record.
Keep PM approval explicit for decision-driving scope, stakeholder-facing output, and release movement.
Preserve observed versus inferred claims when evidence is incomplete.
Prefer the smallest coherent slice that can be reviewed and validated end to end.

quality_contract.decision_needed: Expand the governed research superpower while preserving the cleared evidence, eval, and decision-memory contracts.
evidence: The frozen eval suite passes with zero regressions.
Portfolio truthfulness is healthy across the bounded baseline.
The current discover loop already produces a strategy-to-research packet with bounded source discovery, contradiction review, and downstream strategy handoff.
alternatives: Broaden governed research now across market, competitor, and customer signals.
Hold on research expansion and keep the current bounded research loop stable while the baseline stays unchanged.
quality_contract.recommendation: Broaden governed research now while keeping PM review, source ranking, freshness, and contradiction handling explicit.
risks: Open-ended source breadth without visible ranking and freshness rules would dilute trust.
Letting researched signals propagate without PM review would overstate confidence and blur claim boundaries.
quality_contract.next_action: Stand up the governed feed registry, expand discovery coverage, and rerun the research loop before broadening downstream strategy claims.

evidence_bundle.summary: ProductOS Reference Workspace should help Product manager using ProductOS with Codex, Claude, Windsurf, or Antigravity style agents solve pms still need a single repo-native way to declare the mission, capture the first few high-signal questions, and steer productos through the full pm loop. while driving make productos credible for the first impatient customer by reducing setup friction and making the pm-first operating surface explicit. through a governed ProductOS loop.
The decision log records the baseline release decisions with reversibility, tradeoffs, rejected options, kill criteria, and follow-up review timing.
Strategic memory captures the prior thesis, later outcome, and lesson for reusable recall.
The frozen eval suite remains a first-class release input for the bounded baseline.
The strategy context makes enterprise linkage, portfolio fit, and constraints explicit before downstream discovery artifacts advance.
The product vision defines customer value, business value, differentiation, and north-star logic for the discover slice.
The market strategy locks the challenger posture and proof requirements before problem framing and PRD generation continue.
The discovery-to-research handoff keeps the research objective, pending questions, and upstream strategy context explicit.
The research notebook turns selected sources into one reusable evidence spine before synthesis and prioritization expand.
The research brief keeps proof gaps, contradictions, and next validation questions visible to the PM.
Customer pulse provides the empathy synthesis layer for the current discovery packet.
The external research review shows whether the selected sources are clear enough to reuse downstream without hiding review items.
The live discover route can still produce a decision-ready PRD package from the inbox.

open_questions: Which source classes should be required in the first broad-but-governed research pass for market, competitor, and customer evidence?
What review threshold should govern when broadened research can update the canonical strategy packet automatically versus requiring explicit PM approval?
recommended_next_action: Expand the governed research superpower, then refresh the canonical strategy packet from the stronger research surface.
